_instructions.howToAdd: 1. Enable ECDH mode in Android app settings. 2. Check DataPad logs for Device ID. 3. Add device entry here with that ID. 4. Script auto-reloads this file.
_instructions.deviceId: 32-character hex string shown in app (derived from public key)
_instructions.publicKey: Base64-encoded EC P-256 public key (export from app or leave as placeholder)

permissions.receive: Device can receive flight data from DCS
permissions.send_commands: Device can send commands to DCS (future feature)

_instructions.security: Only devices in this list can establish ECDH handshake. PSK still protects handshake messages.
